claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: No real backend properties, no hardware execution, no real transcript rows, leakage-blind fitting is unsafe, and full private-material leakage still breaks the protocol.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: Synthetic transcript controls, fitted holdout spoofers, and a GenericBackendV2-style calibrated Aer bridge are present.

readiness_gates.label: Synthetic private-challenge transcript bridge is present
readiness_gates.missing_to_promote: Keep the synthetic bridge as a control denominator for real transcripts.

readiness_gates.label: Fitted train/holdout diagnostic is present
readiness_gates.missing_to_promote: Reuse the same split discipline on real-backend or hardware transcripts.

readiness_gates.label: GenericBackendV2 calibrated Aer bridge exists
readiness_gates.missing_to_promote: Replace GenericBackendV2-style simulated calibration with real backend properties.

readiness_gates.label: Private-safe no-leak fitted acceptance stays below 0.10
readiness_gates.missing_to_promote: Re-test this margin on real-backend leakage-separated holdout rows.

readiness_gates.label: Real backend properties are used
readiness_gates.missing_to_promote: Attach backend properties from an actual device snapshot or provider calibration export.

readiness_gates.label: Hardware execution is performed
readiness_gates.missing_to_promote: Run randomized-measurement circuits on hardware or independently supplied hardware traces.

readiness_gates.label: Leakage-separated fitted training uses real transcripts
readiness_gates.missing_to_promote: Train and hold out leakage-separated spoofers on real-backend or hardware transcript rows.

readiness_gates.label: Leakage-blind no-leak fitted acceptance is below 0.10
readiness_gates.missing_to_promote: Separate leakage regimes or redesign private predicates so leakage-blind training cannot lift no-leak acceptance.

readiness_gates.label: Full private-material leakage is bounded
readiness_gates.missing_to_promote: Redesign the challenge material so full leakage is outside the claim boundary or cryptographically protected.

readiness_gates.label: No forbidden advantage or soundness claim is made
readiness_gates.missing_to_promote: Keep all claims bounded until real-backend transcript readiness passes.
